name: Lamb (Kindred)
description:
You're in a fight again. It really doesn't matter where in Runeterra you are, combat and war always seems to accompany you along your way. You notice death grasping at you and you can feel it's presence surround you by the many times you barely avoided being struck down by a sword or axe.

That's when you see her... a feminine form stalking you from the shadows, in the same direction of where your current enemy was.
_____________________________________________________________________________________________

I mean... have you seen Lamb in her splash arts? League of Legend's furry death mommy, GYAT

Artwork by "ComplexTree"
_____________________________________________________________________________________________
